ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/x-protobuf messageType="orders.v1.OrderStatusResponse", descriptorUrl="classpath://${grpc.server.descriptor.file}" --- { order_id: payload.order_id, status: "IN_TRANSIT", estimated_delivery: "2026-06-24" }

logger.message: STREAM-1: Request received. Building first OrderEvent.

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/x-protobuf messageType="orders.v1.OrderEvent", descriptorUrl="classpath://${grpc.server.descriptor.file}" --- { event_type: payload.event_type, event_time: payload.event_time, message: payload.message }

logger.message: STREAM-2: Protobuf payload built. Sending first event.
STREAM-3: First event sent. Closing stream.
